eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Vermont; at 11:07 PM on JUN 15, 2026 Effective until 1:07 AM JUN 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a TEST of the State of Vermont Emergency Alert System. No action is required. This is only a TEST. If this was an actual emergency, instructions would follow this message.
